threadName: Image description of a person on

messages.content:
A person is seated on a white couch, wearing a light-gray sweatshirt and holding a smartphone with both hands near their lap. The person's face is blurred or obscured. Behind them is a large city-street image or poster featuring a yellow taxi and urban scene. The photo is taken indoors with even, soft lighting and the camera is roughly eye-level, framing the subject from about the waist up.

Suggested alt text: "Person with blurred face sitting on a white couch wearing a light-gray sweatshirt and holding a smartphone; large city-street poster with a yellow taxi on the wall behind them."
